query:
mutation { createDiscussion(input: { repositoryId: "R_kgDOTYJ2yw", categoryId: "DIC_kwDOTYJ2y84DBLKZ", title: "👻 Ghost Font Decoder — Read the anti-AI font that tricks GPT-5 and Claude", body: "I built a tool that decodes Ghost Font (mixfont.com/ghost-font) — a new typeface designed to be unreadable by AI that hides text as moving dots, invisible in any single frame.

**How it works:**
1. Detect dark moving pixels in every frame
2. Count light→dark transitions per pixel (moving dots flicker; static decoys don't)
3. Keep the top 1% most-active pixels — these trace the letters
4. Dilate into readable strokes
5. EasyOCR attempts to read it (best-effort)

**Stack:** Python, OpenCV, EasyOCR, Tkinter GUI

**Repo:** https://github.com/roohan-514/ghost-decoder

Try it with any Ghost Font video from mixfont.com/ghost-font!" }) { discussion { url } } }
